description: Demo applications with full workflow statuses including new opportunities.

data.proposal: I offer structural engineering and shop drawing review services. I have 10+ years experience in Riyadh and can start in April 2026. My rate fits within your 10K SAR budget.

responses.taskBidComments: Two-week delivery with milestone at design review and BOQ submission.
